seoTitle: Sutton Grange vs Swan Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sutton Grange and Swan Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sutton Grange vs Swan Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sutton Grange and Swan Hill.
heading: Sutton Grange vs Swan Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sutton Grange, Victoria and Swan Hill, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sutton Grange has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Swan Hill (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sutton Grange or Swan Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sutton Grange has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Swan Hill scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sutton Grange scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Swan Hill scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sutton Grange or Swan Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sutton Grange has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
